title: NAV-iskonto-Z mean-reversion (per-holding TIME-SERIES, NOT cross-sectional). A NEW paradigm after cross-sectional factor selection was EXHAUSTED (hi52 KAPANDI D-205, lowvol63 ELENDI NRR-007, value-regime ELENDI NRR-008/PR#177 -- 3/3 closed). FROZEN before any edge is measured.
decision_owner: the project. Harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; does NOT finalize deployment. Even a GERCEK-SINYAL headline is at most a deploy CANDIDATE for a SEPARATE the project decision (the full RR-013 architecture). This is the FIRST NAV-discount reading (measurement-ONLY); deployment is NEVER auto-triggered.
paradigm_frame: TIME-SERIES, NOT cross-sectional. The cross-sectional keep-bar (rank-IC, EW-null, fair-selection) does NOT apply. Each holding has its OWN NAV-discount time-series and is standardized against its OWN history. There is no cross-holding ranking. The unit of analysis is (holding, month); the signal is per-holding discount-Z.
honest_expectation: UNCERTAIN (open mind). Holding-discount mean-reversion is well-documented for US closed-end funds (Pontiff 1995: half-life 7.7-10.3 months) but is UNTESTED on BIST holdings, and N is small (6). Practitioner evidence is mixed: RR-013 found Turkish brokers in 4Q25-2Q26 preferring direct subsidiaries over the holding gateway trade (anti-MR intuition). Elimination is a clean, valuable result. NO celebration. If a signal appears, the FULL RR-013 architecture is a SEPARATE next step (the project); this is the first reading only.
minimal_reading_note: This is a MINIMAL first reading, NOT the full RR-013 architecture (no SQLite NAV history layer, no live yfinance fetch, no per-share NAV, no signal-table deployment). It computes a frozen, look-ahead-safe discount-Z panel from the committed degoran monthly fundamentals and runs 5 time-series gates. MEASUREMENT-ONLY; optimization FORBIDDEN.

signal_definition_FROZEN.nav_formula: NAV_holding(t) = sum_i ( stake_i * subsidiary_market_cap_i(t) ), over the holding's LISTED subsidiaries that have a degoran market cap at month t. Net-cash/debt and UNLISTED (private) subsidiaries are OMITTED -- a near-constant proportional level that the per-holding Z-score absorbs (DECLARED). Subsidiary market cap = degoran 'mktval', monthly.
signal_definition_FROZEN.discount: discount(t) = ( NAV_holding(t) - holding_market_cap(t) ) / NAV_holding(t). POSITIVE discount = the holding trades BELOW its look-through NAV (cheap).
signal_definition_FROZEN.discount_z: discount_z(t) = ( discount(t) - trailing_mean(t) ) / trailing_std(t), where trailing_mean/std are computed on the SAME holding's discount over the trailing window ending at t-1 (look-ahead-safe; only data <= the standardization cutoff is used).
signal_definition_FROZEN.trailing_window_note: FROZEN at 36 months (~3x the literature half-life; stable mean/std). min_periods=24 starts the series. NO 24/48/60 sweep (a window sweep = multiple-comparisons = p-hacking = FORBIDDEN). Early warmup months (<36m history, esp. 2009-2011) carry noisier Z and are FLAGGED; AGHOL's short history (listing 2018-01) yields usable Z only from ~2021+.
signal_definition_FROZEN.hypothesis: discount_z HIGH (discount unusually wide vs the holding's own history -> holding cheap) -> POSITIVE forward return (mean-reversion). The PRIMARY pooled coefficient on discount_z is expected POSITIVE if the hypothesis holds.
signal_definition_FROZEN.unit_harmonization_FROZEN: The degoran source files carry a few market-wide REDENOMINATION/unit breaks (e.g., a ~1000x jump at 2026-02; a transient at 2009-09..10). discount is a WITHIN-MONTH ratio (NAV and holding market cap from the SAME file/month) so the SIGNAL is fully unit-robust; but cross-month RETURNS are not. A frozen preprocessing step harmonizes units: per month, compute the cross-sectional MEDIAN month-over-month market-cap ratio across the universe; if |log10(median)| > 0.7 (a >5x or <0.2x market-wide move, impossible for a real one-month return), treat it as a power-of-10 redenomination and adjust a cumulative scale by 10^round(log10(median)). This is data cleaning (redenomination detection), NOT optimization. Validated: after harmonization the FIDELITY-GUARD passes (median corr 0.999, median MAE 0.0155 on 2019-2026).

lookahead_convention_FROZEN.rule: ASYMMETRIC and INTENTIONAL. In the NAV numerator, each subsidiary market cap is lagged 1 month (subsidiary mktval(t-1)) to respect a conservative publication/availability lag. In the discount denominator, the holding's OWN market cap is the SAME-month (t) traded price (no lag -- it is a live observable price). The asymmetry is deliberate and documented: subsidiary-side conservative lag, holding-side live price.
lookahead_convention_FROZEN.standardization_cutoff: trailing_mean/std use discount observations up to and including t-1 (the current month's discount is NOT in its own standardization window). discount_z(t) is thus computable live at month t.

return_construction_FROZEN.definition: mktval-implied TOTAL return, UNIFORM across 2009-2026: fwd_return(t, h) = holding_market_cap(t+h) / holding_market_cap(t) - 1 + dividend_term(t, t+h). Market cap is continuous through splits/bonus issues, so the price-return leg is split/bonus-robust by construction.
return_construction_FROZEN.dividend_term: Approximated from degoran trailing dividend yield (dyld = dy/100) prorated over the horizon: dividend_term ~ dyld(t) * h/12. The FIDELITY-GUARD validates the FULL total-return proxy against the frozen adjusted_close panel on the 2019-2026 overlap; if dividends are mishandled the guard MAE exceeds the bound and the engine RAISES.
return_construction_FROZEN.rights_issue_bias: DECLARED. Rights issues (bedelli) are rare for these large holdings but, when they occur, the mktval-implied return slightly mis-states the per-share total return (capital injection vs pure price move). Rare; declared; not corrected (minimal reading).
return_construction_FROZEN.horizon_note: PRIMARY horizon = 6 months (FROZEN; mid-range of the 7.7-10.3 month literature half-life). 1/3-month horizons are SECONDARY CONTEXT ONLY and are NEVER gated. NO horizon sweep.

fidelity_guard_FROZEN.purpose: Self-validation in the D-202 spirit. The mktval-implied total-return proxy (used UNIFORMLY 2009-2026) MUST match the frozen adjusted_close total return on the 2019-2026 overlap, where both are available.
fidelity_guard_FROZEN.rule: On the overlap, per-holding correlation(mktval-implied TR, adjusted_close TR) >= 0.95 AND mean-absolute-error <= 0.03. If EITHER bound fails for the pooled/median check, the engine RAISES (test STOPS). This catches a broken return proxy BEFORE any gate is read.
fidelity_guard_FROZEN.rationale: Chosen by the maintainer over a methodology break at 2019 (which would put a uniform-methodology discontinuity exactly at the gate-4 regime split = a spurious regime = poisonous). Uniform 2009-2026 keeps gate-4 clean; the guard proves the uniform proxy is faithful where it can be checked.

universe_composition_FROZEN.curation_note: Builder-curated per the maintainer delegation (2026-06-03). Each holding carries a verification_status, a stake_source, and a listed_dominated flag. Constant-share-bias is OPENLY DECLARED: stakes are treated as piecewise-constant; the per-holding Z-score absorbs a constant proportional NAV bias, but a TIME-VARYING listed-fraction (private-asset growth / divestiture) leaves a deterministic discount DRIFT that could masquerade as mean-reversion -- this is controlled by the per-holding linear-time detrend (trap-1 remedy) and probed by LOHO. Deploy-stage KAP verification of stakes is a SEPARATE next step (the project).
universe_composition_FROZEN.stake_irrelevance_note: Because discount_z standardizes per-holding, a CONSTANT stake error is absorbed entirely. For SINGLE-listed-subsidiary holdings (BRYAT) the stake level is irrelevant to Z (NAV proportional to one market cap -> any constant stake gives identical Z). For multi-subsidiary holdings only the RELATIVE sub-weights affect NAV dynamics; absolute levels are absorbed.

KCHOL.name: Koc Holding
KCHOL.omitted_note: Net cash (~+5.5% of NAV) and unlisted (Entek, Setur, RMK Marine, Tarim Kredi) OMITTED -- near-constant level absorbed by Z.

SAHOL.name: Sabanci Holding
SAHOL.omitted_note: AKGRT/AGESA (stakes not numerically RR-013-confirmed; AGESA listed 2021-08), private Enerjisa Uretim/Climate-Tech OMITTED -- absorbed by Z. AKBNK dominates SAHOL NAV (~59%): a single-subsidiary-dominance to watch in LOHO/carry-trap.

AGHOL.name: Anadolu Grubu Holding
AGHOL.omitted_note: CCOLA EXCLUDED to avoid DOUBLE-COUNT (AEFES owns CCOLA; including both double-counts). Private (McDonald's Turkey, Anadolu Isuzu via AEFES chain) OMITTED. SHORT history flagged.

BRYAT.name: Borusan Yatirim ve Pazarlama
BRYAT.stake_source: public KAP approximate (~24.6% of BRSAN); stake LEVEL irrelevant to Z for a single-sub holding
BRYAT.omitted_note: Private Borcelik/Supsan OMITTED; BRYAT NAV is BRSAN-stake-dominated, so the single-sub Z is robust to the stake level (proportional).

ALARK.name: Alarko Holding
ALARK.omitted_note: CAUTION: Alarko's TRUE NAV is DOMINATED by PRIVATE energy (CENAL 50%, Meram Elektrik) + Alsim construction. Listed-only NAV (ALCAR+ALGYO) is a SMALL, TIME-VARYING fraction of true NAV -> a deterministic discount drift risk (trap-1). KEPT per approved plan, controlled by per-holding linear-time detrend + LOHO; flagged here for honest interpretation.

DOHOL.name: Dogan Holding
DOHOL.data_span: 2009-01..2026-04 (holding full; key listed sub GWIND only 2021-04+)
DOHOL.omitted_note: CAUTION: Post-2018 media sale, Dogan's value is mostly PRIVATE (D-Auto, Celik Motor, energy, real estate, finance). Listed-only NAV (GWIND 2021+, DITAS tiny) is small and its listed-fraction CHANGED sharply at the 2018 divestiture -> strong trap-1 drift risk. KEPT per approved plan, controlled by detrend + LOHO; flagged.

universe_composition_FROZEN.survivorship_note: The holding set is today-surviving = a selection. Unavoidable at N=6; OPENLY DECLARED. LOHO partially mitigates single-holding dominance. NO cross-sectional generalization is claimed -- this is a time-series measurement on a curated, declared set.

five_time_series_gates_FROZEN.frame: TIME-SERIES gates (NOT the cross-sectional keep-bar). Pooled (holding, month) panel of fwd_return ~ discount_z with holding fixed-effects.
five_time_series_gates_FROZEN.gate1_signal_content: Pooled-panel OLS fwd_return(h=6) ~ discount_z with HOLDING FIXED-EFFECTS (within coefficient PRIMARY; discount_z is already per-holding trailing-de-meaned so FE absorbs the constant-share-bias offset). No-FE is cross-check ONLY (between-dimension degenerate at N=6). PASS direction: discount_z coefficient POSITIVE. Overlapping returns -> HAC lags = horizon h = 6 (NOTE: the committed _nw_t hardcodes lags=3, WRONG for h=6; D-206 sets lags=h explicitly).
five_time_series_gates_FROZEN.gate2_significance: Few-cluster (N=6) is the MAIN statistical risk -> naive cluster-t over-rejects. Honest hierarchy: PRIMARY = Driscoll-Kraay SE (statsmodels cov_type with HAC over time, robust to cross-holding contemporaneous correlation; leans on T~165 months, NOT on few-N), Bartlett, lags=h=6. CORROBORATION = wild cluster bootstrap (Rademacher, null-imposed, Cameron-Gelbach-Miller; seed=12345, n=2000), report bootstrap-p. CONTEXT = per-holding NW|t| (lags=h) + same-sign count. PASS = DK|t| >= 2.0 AND wild-boot p < 0.05 AND >= 80% (>=5/6) holdings positive sign. A single cluster-t is NEVER the headline (bias-flag). Conservative / false-negative-leaning (the maintainer-confirmed acceptable).
five_time_series_gates_FROZEN.gate3_null: Per-holding CIRCULAR-SHIFT null (NOT i.i.d.-shuffle, NOT random-entry). discount_z and fwd_return are both strongly autocorrelated -> an i.i.d. shuffle would destroy AC and build a spuriously narrow null. Construction: hold the fwd_return panel FIXED; independently random circular-shift each holding's discount_z series (AC fully preserved, signal-return alignment broken); re-fit the FE regression each draw. n=2000, seed=12345. pctile = P(null beta < real beta); PASS if real beta beats the 95th percentile. block-bootstrap cross-check.
five_time_series_gates_FROZEN.gate4_regime: Split 2009-2016 low-inflation (REGIME_LOWINFL_END=2017-01-01) vs 2022-01+ high-inflation (REGIME_PRIMARY=2022-01-01) -- a GENUINE second regime unlocked by the 2009 data extension. PASS if the MR coefficient is positive in BOTH regimes. regime_split reused.
five_time_series_gates_FROZEN.gate5_cost_realistic: D-204 realistic per-stock Roll(1984)+Kyle(1985) cost REUSED VERBATIM (per_stock_cost_panel / d204_basket_net_series / breakeven_cost_bps / holding_period_stats; lambda_kyle FROZEN=1.0). Daily-price-based -> available 2019-2026 ONLY (reported as the realistic-cost view; the 2009-2018 leg has no daily clean prices). Turnover expected LOW (MR half-life ~7-10mo) -> cost should eat little. PASS if after-cost edge > 0; breakeven vs realistic cost REPORTED.

controls_FROZEN.carry_trap: Real-TLREF (TLREF - YoY-TUFE) as a 2nd regressor (D206_TLREF_SNAPSHOT=exposure_d187_tlref, available 2022-07+ -> control only on that overlap). A wide-discount holdco may proxy a cash-rich entity earning real-TLREF carry, so 'MR return' could be carry. The trap is REJECTED only if discount_z stays POSITIVE and DK-significant AFTER the carry control. Cross-check: fwd_return ~ real-TLREF alone.
controls_FROZEN.loho_leave_one_holding_out: Re-run gate-1 FE N=6 times, dropping one holding each time; report per-fit beta + DK-t + max |delta-beta|. FAIL if dropping ANY single holding flips the sign OR drops DK|t| below 2. Directly probes single-holding dominance (esp. AKBNK-in-SAHOL, and the listed-partial ALARK/DOHOL).
controls_FROZEN.trap1_linear_time_detrend: Per-holding linear-time control: regress discount on a per-holding linear time trend BEFORE standardization (or include holding-specific time trend), removing the deterministic listed-fraction drift (the constant-share-bias TREND, not just level). This is the approved-plan remedy for the time-varying listed-fraction in ALARK/DOHOL (rather than excluding them). Report beta WITH and WITHOUT the detrend.
controls_FROZEN.trap2_nonstationary_std: trailing-std is non-stationary across regimes (2009-2016 vs 2022+); when the window spans the 2022 inflation break, Z is mis-scaled. The look-ahead-safe trailing-std adapts, but early-warmup Z (2009-2011, <36m) is noisy -> FLAGGED / down-weighted.
controls_FROZEN.trap5_cross_holding_correlation: Report the average pairwise correlation of holding discount_z residuals so the reader sees how much the Driscoll-Kraay SE leans on T vs on the (few, co-moving-with-BIST) N.

verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.SERAP: gate-2 FAILS (DK|t|<2 OR wild-boot p>=0.05 OR <5/6 same-sign) OR gate-1 coefficient sign WRONG (negative -> no MR) OR gate-3 null not beaten -> NO real signal -> the NAV-discount first reading is SERAP. Clean archive; honest elimination; NO celebration.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.GERCEK-SINYAL: all cost-free gates pass (1-4, incl. carry-trap survived + LOHO robust) AND gate-5 after-cost edge > 0 AND breakeven >= 2x realistic cost -> a deploy CANDIDATE for the FULL RR-013 architecture (a SEPARATE the project decision; NOT auto-deployed). SURPRISE relative to the UNCERTAIN prior.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.GERCEK-ama-tradeable-DEGIL: cost-free gates pass BUT gate-5 after-cost <= 0 OR breakeven < 2x realistic cost -> signal real but not retail-tradeable; archive honestly.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.n_lock: NAV-discount gets N<=3 measurement rounds; D-206 is the FIRST (=1).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_combined.no_post_hoc_relaxation: trailing window (36m), horizon (6m), DK|t| threshold (2.0), null pctile (0.95), same-sign fraction (0.80), 2x cost safety, universe composition, lag convention, and regime split are FROZEN here; none is loosened after seeing results. A signal, if found, triggers the SEPARATE full-architecture step (the project), NOT a here-and-now deployment.

engine_discipline: committed-engine ZERO touch. The ONLY committed-data change is the read-only loader-glob extension (clean_universe_fundamentals.load_degoran_fundamentals file_glob='degoran*.zip', default 'degoran_M_*.zip' unchanged -> D-203/204/NRR-007/008 content-hashes preserved). D-206 computes its panel and calls D-203/D-204 helpers read-only; it does NOT modify them. The engine REFUSES to run unless this Stage-0 file exists (require_stage0 RAISE).

thresholds_reference.decision_constants: src/signals/thresholds.py D206_* block (single source): D206_TRAILING_WINDOW_MONTHS=36, D206_TRAILING_MIN_PERIODS=24, D206_PRIMARY_HORIZON_MONTHS=6, D206_SECONDARY_HORIZONS=(1,3), D206_PUBLICATION_LAG_MONTHS=1, D206_GATE_NW_T_MIN=2.0, D206_GATE_NULL_PCTILE=0.95, D206_GATE_SAME_SIGN_FRAC=0.80, D206_NULL_N_RESAMPLES=2000, D206_NULL_SEED=12345, D206_WILD_BOOT_N=2000, D206_REGIME_PRIMARY=2022-01-01, D206_REGIME_LOWINFL_END=2017-01-01, D206_STRATEGY_ENTRY_Z=1.0, D206_STRATEGY_EXIT_Z=0.0, D206_FIDELITY_MIN_CORR=0.95, D206_FIDELITY_MAX_MAE=0.03.
thresholds_reference.measurement_geometry: src/screening/d206_config.py (reuses D-203 price/TUFE snapshots + D-204 price-content-hash/cost geometry verbatim; adds frozen discount-Z geometry + extended degoran 2009-2026 fundamentals source).

fundamentals_extended.use: NAV subsidiary market caps + holding market cap + dividends + returns

outputs: docs/yol1/d206_results.json (after run: per-holding discount-Z coverage + pooled FE beta + DK-t + wild-boot-p + per-holding NW + same-sign + circular-shift null + regime split + carry-trap + LOHO + FIDELITY-GUARD + realistic cost/breakeven/turnover + combined verdict)
docs/research/D-206-rapor.md (verdict SERAP / GERCEK-SINYAL / GERCEK-ama-tradeable-DEGIL; per-holding detail; OOS/honesty caveats) + docs/RESEARCH_REGISTRY.md line
